```python
input_file_name = input("enter the name of the input FASTA file")
```

    enter the name of the input FASTA file sequence.txt



```python
with open(input_file_name, "r") as input_file:
    DNA_sequence = ""
    for line in input_file:
        if line.startswith(">"):
            continue
        DNA_sequence += line.strip()
```


```python
RNA_sequence = ""
for nucleotide in DNA_sequence:
    if nucleotide == "T":
        RNA_sequence += "U"
    else:
        RNA_sequence += nucleotide
```


```python
output_file_name = input("enter the name of the output file")
```

    enter the name of the output file FMR1_RNA.txt



```python
with open(output_file_name, "w") as output_file:
    output_file.write(RNA_sequence)
    print(f"the RNA sequence has been saved to {output_file_name}")
```

    the RNA sequence has been saved to FMR1_RNA.txt



```python
print(RNA_sequence)
```
